content: It's the season of the witch. #PracticalMagic2 casts its spell in theaters this September. Starring Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman, PRACTICAL MAGIC 2 returns to a world steeped in moonlit mischief and powerful ancestral magic, as the Owens sisters must confront the dark curse that threatens to unravel their family once and for all in a must-see cinematic event of fun, magic and mayhem. Starring along with Bullock and Kidman in PRACTICAL MAGIC 2 are Joey King, Lee Pace, Maisie Williams, Xolo Maridueña, Solly McLeod, with Dianne Wiest, and Stockard Channing. Susanne Bier directs from a screenplay by Akiva Goldsman and Georgia Pritchett and Kelly Marcel, based on the novel entitled The Book of Magic by Alice Hoffman. It is produced by Denise Di Novi, Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman. The executive producers are Donald Sabourin, Alice Hoffman, Andrew A. Kosove and Broderick Johnson. Bier has assembled an esteemed group of film artisans to join her, including director of photography Simon Duggan, production designer Tom Burton, editor Sam Williams, music supervisors Season Kent and Gabe Hilfer, composer Rupert Gregson-Williams, costume designer Alexandra Byrne, and casting director Jina Jay. Warner Bros. Pictures Presents, In Association with Alcon Entertainment, A DiNovi Pictures / A Fortis Films / A Blossom Films Production, A Susanne Bier Film: PRACTICAL MAGIC 2. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters in North America on September 11, 2026, and internationally beginning 9 September 2026.
chineseContent: 现在是女巫的季节。 #PracticalMagic2 今年九月将在影院上映。由桑德拉·布洛克和妮可·基德曼主演的《实用魔法 2》回到了一个充满月光恶作剧和强大祖传魔法的世界，欧文斯姐妹必须面对威胁要彻底解散她们家庭的黑暗诅咒，这是一场充满乐趣、魔法和混乱的必看电影事件。 《实用魔法 2》中与布洛克和基德曼一起主演的还有乔伊·金、李·佩斯、麦茜·威廉姆斯、索洛·马里杜尼亚、索利·麦克劳德、黛安·韦斯特和斯托卡特·钱宁。苏珊·比尔执导，剧本由阿齐瓦·高斯曼、乔治亚·普里切特和凯莉·马塞尔改编，改编自爱丽丝·霍夫曼的小说《魔法书》。该片由丹尼斯·迪·诺维、桑德拉·布洛克和妮可·基德曼制作。执行制片人为唐纳德·萨布林、爱丽丝·霍夫曼、安德鲁·A·科索夫和布罗德里克·约翰逊。比尔召集了一批受人尊敬的电影工匠加入她的行列，包括摄影指导西蒙·杜根、制作设计师汤姆·伯顿、剪辑师萨姆·威廉姆斯、音乐总监季肯特和加布·希尔弗、作曲家鲁珀特·格雷格森-威廉姆斯、服装设计师亚历山德拉·伯恩和选角导演吉娜·杰伊。华纳兄弟影业与 Alcon Entertainment 联合推出由 DiNovi Pictures / A Fortis Films / A Blossom Films Production 制作的 Susanne Bier 电影：《实用魔法 2》。该影片将由华纳兄弟影业在全球范围内发行，仅于 2026 年 9 月 11 日在北美影院上映，自 2026 年 9 月 9 日起在全球范围内上映。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
